gold_intro_1: Golide yagwiritsidwa ntchito ngati ndalama kwa zaka masauzande ndipo anthu ambiri amayiona ngati malo otetezera ndalama.
gold_intro_2: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zadigitala zomwe zinapangidwa mu 2009 ndipo anthu ambiriso amayiona ngati malo otetezera ndalama.
gold_intro_3: Koma kodi chitsulo chooneka ngati golide chimasiyana bwanji ndi ndalama zadigitala ngati Bitcoin? Tiyeni tione kusiyana pakati pa mitundu iwiri ya ndalama: Bitcoin ndi Golide.
point_1_summary_1: Chifukwa Bitcoin ndi yadigitala, imatha kutumizidwa msanga ndi malipiro ochepa ndi aliyense amene ali ndi intaneti. Chifukwa Golide ndi chinthu chamaonekedwe, siingayendetsedwe pa intaneti ndipo iyenera kutumizidwa pamanjanja kuti uchikhale mwini.
point_2_summary_1: Bitcoin ndi chuma chadigitala kwenizeni, kutanthauza kuti mutha kupereka umwini wonse pa intaneti. Makampani ena amapereka mwayi wogula golide pa intaneti popanda kulandira golideyo, m'malo mwake kukhulupirira kampaniyo kuti asunga golideyo. Izi zili ngati IOU yadigitala chifukwa muli ndi lonjezo la kampaniyo osati chuma chenichenicho.
point_3_summary_1: Bitcoin ili ndi malire olimba a Bitcoin 21 Miliyoni yomwe idzakhaleko.
point_3_summary_2: Golide yatsopano imachotsedwa pansi chaka chilichonse, zomwe zimapangitsa kukwera kwa kuchuluka. Zikuwoneka kuti kuchuluka kwa golide kumakwera pafupifupi 1.6% pachaka, kutanthauza kuti gawo lanu la keiki limachepa 1.6% pachaka.
point_3_summary_3: Izi ndi zochepa kuposa kukwera kwa ndalama za boma, koma kukwera kumene.
point_3_summary_4: Ndi Bitcoin, gawo lanu la keiki silichepa.
point_4_summary_1: Golide ili ndi kuchuluka komata, kutanthauza kuti mtengo wa golide ukukwera, pali chilimbikitso chachikulu kufukula golide zambiri. Izi nthawi zambiri zimapanikiza mtengo wa golide pansi pomwe magodoro atsopano akuyamba kugwira ntchito.
point_4_summary_2: Ndi Bitcoin, mosasamala mtengo ukukwera bwanji, simungapange Bitcoin zopitirira 21M.
point_4_summary_3: Bitcoin ndi chuma choyamba chokhala ndi ubale wosagwedezeka pakati pa mtengo ndi kuchuluka.
point_5_summary_2: Zikwi makumi a ma node odziimira okha amatsimikizira malamulo a netiwekiyo.
point_5_summary_3: Ogwiritsa ntchito atha kusunga Bitcoin yawo okha potitsa pulogalamu.
point_5_summary_4: Ngakhale n'kotheka kusunga golide yanu pawokha, golide yambiri imasungidwa m'zipinda zikuluzikulu za osunga katundu zomwe zimapangitsa kukhala yokhazikika pamalo amodzi.
point_6_summary_1: Ndi Bitcoin, n'kosavuta kwambiri kutsimikizira kuti muli ndi Bitcoin yeniyeni pokusunga ndi kuthamanga node yathunthu.
point_6_summary_2: Kusunga wekha n'kosavuta ngati kutitsa pulogalamu.
point_6_summary_3: Node yathunthu ndi pulogalamu yosavuta yomwe imatsimikizira kuti malamulo a netiweki akutsatidwa, ndi kutsimikizira kuti muli ndi Bitcoin yeniyeni.
point_6_summary_4: Golide yamaonekedwe imatha kukhala yovuta kwambiri kutsimikizira kuti ndi yeniyeni. Ngakhale mutatsimikizira kuti mbali yakunja ya golide yamaonekedwe ndi yeniyeni, mkati mwa golide yanuyo mungakhale Tungsten kapena chitsulo china chomwe si golide. Njira yokhayo yotsimikizira kwenikweni ndi kuisungunula.
point_7_summary_1: Monga momwe pali ma senti 100 mu dola 1, pali sats 100,000,000 mu Bitcoin 1. Izi zimathandiza Bitcoin kugwiritsidwa ntchito pa malonda aliwonse, kuphatikiza malonda ang'onoang'ono a masenti ochepa.
point_7_summary_2: Izi zimapangitsa Bitcoin kukhala yabwino kwa bizinesi.
point_7_summary_3: Chifukwa golide yamaonekedwe ndi yovuta kugawa, singagwiritsidwe ntchito mosavuta pa malonda, makamaka malonda ang'onoang'ono.
